data.error:
Usage limit reached — retrying will not help until the quota resets.

Check the provider billing/quota dashboard, top up credits, or switch to a different model/provider with `/model`.

error.message: Your credit balance is too low to access the Anthropic API. Please go to Plans & Billing to upgrade or purchase credits.
